cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

ki.description: Mur'Neth's tp2 uses GAME_IS checks that fail when installed pre-EET. The mod must detect 'eet' in GAME_IS to include EET transition support.
ki.workaround: Install after EET core (EET_Start) on the BG2EE executable, not before. DLC Merger must also have run first.

sum: Adds Mur'Neth, a ghaunadan (ooze shapechanger), as a joinable BG1 NPC. A truly unusual companion with alien perspective dialogue.
no: This mod contains two components. The first is the joinable NPC Mur'Neth for BG1. Though it was planned as a One - Day NPC inspired by the Pocket Plane Group, since the initial version a lot more content has been added and it has as much as, or more than, any other NPC in BG.

co.no: mod_installer: game detection fails when installed pre-EET. tp2 correctly lists eet in GAME_IS check (line 10: NOT GAME_IS tutu tutu_totsc bgt bgee eet => FAIL). Post-EET install will detect GAME_IS eet and include EET/other/EET_functions.tph (line 536) for NPC transition support. Fix: install after EET_Start on BG2EE executable. DLC Merger check at line 12 also requires sod-dlc.zip to already be merged before install.
